'''Rin Assid''', also known as "'''Assid the Lucky'''", was a near-mythical [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] who lived during the fourth [[Millennium/Legends|millennium]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]. He was a good-natured man with a love of good food and good drink. He regularly won vast fortunes, only to in turn lose his newfound wealth helping others in need. One of his partners was [[Arlo Hirken]].<ref name="HSCS" /> He was credited with helping to spread the usage of the [[Aurebesh/Legends|Aurebesh]] throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="The Written Word">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/source/writtenword/index.html?page=1|text=The Written Word|int=The Written Word}}</ref> His name was later applied to the venerable [[Rin Assid Bulk Hauler]].<ref name="HSCS" />
